chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6554 of 2021 M/s Sugrah Enterprises Versus Collector of Customs & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc.28023/21 2. For orders on Misc.28024/21 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 10.12.2021 Mr. Rashid Khan Mahar for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner submits that the issue as to Delay Detention Certificate has been resolved and as such, on instructions, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
